ipsec_esp_ipv4_tunnel_ibound_sa_t Struct Reference
[IPsec ESP Inbound (gxcr/tokens/esp_ip4v_tunnel_ibound.h)]

Data structure that encapsulates general IPsec SA and operation-specific parameters. More...


Data Fields

gxcr_ipsec_sa_t ipsec_sa
 General IPsec Security Association.
int nonpayload_len
 Length, in bytes, of the ESP header in packets handled by this operation.
int additional_packet_len
 The maximum amount by which a result packet is larger, for this specific combination of token operation, algorithm, and parameters.

Detailed Description

Data structure that encapsulates general IPsec SA and operation-specific parameters.

The operation-specific parameters are initialized at setup time and used at runtime.

Examples:

mica/ipsec/app.c.

Field Documentation

gxcr_ipsec_sa_t ipsec_esp_ipv4_tunnel_ibound_sa_t::ipsec_sa

General IPsec Security Association.

Examples:
mica/ipsec/app.c.

int ipsec_esp_ipv4_tunnel_ibound_sa_t::nonpayload_len

Length, in bytes, of the ESP header in packets handled by this operation.

int ipsec_esp_ipv4_tunnel_ibound_sa_t::additional_packet_len

The maximum amount by which a result packet is larger, for this specific combination of token operation, algorithm, and parameters.

  • gxcr/tokens/esp_ipv4_tunnel_ibound.h
